message:
fix: unassign work beads before releasing polecat name on removal

When RemoveWithOptions nukes a polecat, it resets the agent bead and
releases the name but never unassigns work beads still pointing at that
polecat. This leaves beads permanently stuck (assigned to a ghost polecat,
status in_progress, no one working on them).

Add unassignWorkBeads() call in RemoveWithOptions after resetting the
agent bead. It queries for all active beads (open, in_progress, hooked)
assigned to the polecat and resets them to status=open with empty
assignee so they can be re-dispatched. Agent beads are skipped since
ResetAgentBeadForReuse handles those separately.

Fixes: gt-e4u1
